# Chapter 6: Concurrency and distributed failure  (~110 pp)
- 6.1 The hard problem of partial failure (12) · 6.2 Race conditions (15) · 6.3 Deadlock, livelock, starvation (15) · 6.4 Distributed-system failure modes (18) · 6.5 Time, clocks, ordering, the missing common substrate (15) · 6.6 Byzantine failure (15) · 6.7 Failure section (case): Therac-25 (race), the 2017 AWS S3 outage, the 2020 Cloudflare outage (20)

**Archetype**: failure, control. **Project**: reproduce a known concurrency bug from a paper; verify and fix. **Exercises**: 25.
